sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Manage devices that are signed in to your account.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.setupDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the verification code.
twoFactor.uriHint: Copy this URI into your authenticator app if you cannot scan the QR code.
twoFactor.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with 2FA. Enter your password to disable it.
twoFactor.notEnabledDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account using a TOTP authenticator app.

forgotPassword.checkEmailDescription: If an account exists for {{email}}, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.

verifyEmail.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email has been verified successfully.
verifyEmail.errorDescription: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

setup.successDescription: Your owner account has been created.
setup.description: No owner account exists yet. Create the first administrator to get started.
setup.orgNameHint: You can rename or add more organizations later.
setup.footerNote: This screen only appears on first launch. After setup, all users sign in normally.

device.invalidDescription: No user code provided. Please use the link from the CLI.
device.deniedDescription: The CLI login request has been denied.
device.title: CLI Login Request
device.subtitle: Approve CLI access for {{email}}

acceptInvitation.title: Organization invitation
acceptInvitation.description: You have been invited to join an organization. Accept or decline below.

consent.title: Authorize {{appName}}
consent.request: {{appName}} is requesting access to your account{{suffix}}.
consent.noRedirect: No redirect URL returned by the server.
consent.footer: You can revoke access any time from your account settings.

scope.offlineAccess: Maintain access while you are offline

applications.title: OAuth Applications
applications.description: Register applications to authenticate users through this server's OpenID Connect identity provider.
applications.registeredDescription: Copy the client secret now — it cannot be displayed again.
applications.deleteDialogDescription: This will permanently delete {{name}}. All access tokens and consents associated with this client will also be revoked. This action cannot be undone.
applications.emptyDescription: Register an application to start integrating SSO.
applications.credentialsDescription: Use these values to configure the OAuth/OIDC client in your application.
applications.credentialsDescriptionDetail: The client secret was shown only once at registration. To rotate it, delete this application and register a new one.
applications.clientSecretWarning: Save this secret now — it cannot be retrieved later.
applications.notFoundDescription: We couldn't find an OAuth application with that client ID.
applications.dangerDescription: Deleting this application revokes all access tokens issued to it and removes any recorded user consents.

form.title: Register OAuth application
form.description: Create credentials so an external app can authenticate users via this server.
form.name: Application name
form.redirectHint: One per line, or comma-separated. Must exactly match the URI the client uses during the authorization flow.
form.redirectRequired: At least one redirect URI is required
form.logoHint: Shown to users on the consent screen.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.description: Select an organization to work with, or create a new one.
organizations.emptyDescription: Create your first organization to start collaborating with your team.

new.title: New organization
new.description: Organizations group projects, metadata, members, and resources together.
new.name: Name
new.slugHint: Lowercase, dashes only. Used in URLs and APIs.

general.deletedDescription: {{name}} and {{deletedProjects}} project(s) (with their databases) have been removed.
general.detailsDescription: Update your organization's display name, URL slug, and logo.
general.detailsReadOnly: Only owners and admins can edit these details.
general.slugHint: Lowercase, dash-separated. Used in URLs and invitations.
general.dangerDescription: Permanently delete this organization, all of its projects, and every project's underlying database. This action cannot be undone.
general.deleteDialogDescription: This will permanently delete {{name}}, all of its projects, and every project's underlying database. Members and pending invitations will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

members.title: Members ({{count}})
members.description: People with access to this organization
members.empty: No members yet. Invite someone to get started.
members.pendingDescription: Invitations sent to join this organization
members.pendingHint: Invitations will appear here once sent

roleHints.owner: Full access to manage the organization
roleHints.admin: Can manage members and settings, but cannot delete the organization
roleHints.member: Can view and use organization resources

members.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this organization?

legal.agreementPrefix: By clicking continue, you agree to our
